body: ``` /codex https://github.com/konard/p-vs-np/pull/548 —model gpt-5.4-mini —think max ``` ``` 🔄 Solve command executing... Status: Executing... 📊 Session: e07625cb-63e5-4081-884c-4d21079b5968 🔒 Isolation: screen Requested by: @drakonard URL: https://github.com/konard/p-vs-np/pull/548 🛠 Options: --model gpt-5.4-mini --think max --tool codex 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary --isolation screen 🔔 This message will update when the session finishes. ``` Message was not updated and stuck in executing state. Also `Status: Executing...` is clearly a duplication, and should be removed. `🔄 Solve command executing...` is enough, yet we can change emoji to sand watch emoji. ``` root@vmi2955137:~# docker exec -it hive-mind /bin/bash box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ screen -r e07625cb-63e5-4081-884c-4d21079b5968 There is no screen to be resumed matching e07625cb-63e5-4081-884c-4d21079b5968. box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ $ --status e07625cb-63e5-4081-884c-4d21079b5968 8ad5fe50-c75e-495d-9722-372149296091 uuid 8ad5fe50-c75e-495d-9722-372149296091 status executed exitCode 0 command "solve https://github.com/konard/p-vs-np/pull/548 --model gpt-5.4-mini --think max --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary" logPath /tmp/start-command/logs/isolation/screen/8ad5fe50-c75e-495d-9722-372149296091.log startTime "2026-04-24T20:55:18.953Z" endTime "2026-04-24T21:12:59.725Z" workingDirectory /home/box shell /bin/sh platform linux options isolated screen isolationMode detached sessionName e07625cb-63e5-4081-884c-4d21079b5968 user false keepAlive false useCommandStream false box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ ``` And actually the screen long ago was executed. So that it is clearly a bug, and an original issue was not fully addressed. Also in terminal state (final update of the message) we should remove `🔔 This message will update when the session finishes.` to free up the space in the chat. Example of failed task: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1672#issuecomment-4316480820 ``` 🔄 Solve command executing... Status: Executing... 📊 Session: 39ae5500-d512-488f-bfe5-8532c358fd73 🔒 Isolation: screen Requested by: @drakonard URL: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1670 🛠 Options: --think max --tool codex 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary --isolation screen 🔔 This message will update when the session finishes. ``` ``` box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ $ --status 39ae5500-d512-488f-bfe5-8532c358fd73 15883d2c-d92b-4c34-89a2-66df5b1dabea uuid 15883d2c-d92b-4c34-89a2-66df5b1dabea status executed exitCode 1 command "solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1670 --think max --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary" logPath /tmp/start-command/logs/isolation/screen/15883d2c-d92b-4c34-89a2-66df5b1dabea.log startTime "2026-04-24T21:17:56.192Z" endTime "2026-04-24T21:39:03.630Z" workingDirectory /home/box shell /bin/sh platform linux options isolated screen isolationMode detached sessionName 39ae5500-d512-488f-bfe5-8532c358fd73 user false keepAlive false useCommandStream false box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ ``` We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to ./docs/case-studies/issue-{id} folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
